title: Miek
content:
{{CharHub|Miek|Miek}} {{Character |image = Tlat miek.png |real name = Miek{{Ref|TR}} |species = [[Sakaaran]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|SAK}} (formerly)
{{Citizenship|ASG3}} |gender = Female |snapped = No{{Ref|AE}} |affiliation = [[Sakaaran Rebellion]] (formerly) |movie = ''[[Thor: Ragnarok]]''
''[[Avengers: Endgame]]''
''[[Thor: Love and Thunder]]'' |actor = [[Stephen Murdoch]] (on-set actor)
[[Carly Rees]] (on-set actress) |status = Alive}} {{Quote|This is my very good friend, Miek.|[[Korg]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} '''Miek''' is a [[Sakaaran]] insectoid warrior who had been forced to fight in the [[Grandmaster]]'s [[Contest of Champions]] with her own robotic exoskeleton. Having been freed from the Grandmaster's prison, Miek fought alongside [[Thor]] and [[Korg]] and joined the Asgardian people in their journey to [[Earth]] after [[Ragnarök]]. Following the [[Snap]], of which Miek was one of the survivors, she made her home in [[New Asgard]] with Korg and the rest of the surviving [[Asgardians]], keeping Thor company as she descended into becoming a drunken hermit due to grief and guilt. During the [[Battle of Earth]], Miek joined the battle, before heading back to New Asgard under [[Valkyrie]]'s new rule. ==Biography== ===Rebellion=== ====[[Contest of Champions]]==== [[File:Miek Meets Thor.png|{{AltFloat}}|Miek is introduced to the newly arrived [[Thor]]]] Miek was outfitted with a robotic exoskeleton and was placed in the [[Contest of Champions]] where she met [[Korg]], who she became friends with. When [[Thor]] was thrown into the [[Contest of Champions]], Miek greeted him with Korg, showing off her exoskeleton's blades proudly. When [[Loki]] visited Thor in the gladiator's quarters, Miek joined Korg in trying to get rid of Loki, believing he was a ghost. Miek witnessed Thor's duel with the [[Hulk]], joining in with the chant supporting Thor.{{Ref|TR}} ====[[Sakaaran Revolution]]==== [[File:Rebellion.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Miek is recruited into the [[Sakaaran Rebellion]]]] {{Quote|Is that some sort of protoplasm, all the stuff that's coming out of you, or are they eggs? Looks like eggs.|[[Korg]] to Miek|Thor: Ragnarok}} While Miek was casually waiting for the next fights with [[Korg]], [[Valkyrie]] stormed the gladiators' quarters and provided Korg with a weapon, initiating the [[Sakaaran Rebellion]]. Miek fought alongside her fellow gladiators against the [[Sakaaran Guards]] and they ultimately reached the [[Grandmaster]]'s garage. After accepting [[Loki]] as their leader, Miek and the other rebels seized the ''[[Statesman]]'' and flew it to [[Asgard]].{{Ref|TR}} ====[[Battle for Asgard]]==== [[File:Bifröst battle.png|{{AltFloat}}|Miek fights along with the [[Sakaaran Rebellion]], [[Loki]], and [[Heimdall]]]] {{Quote|Miek's dead. I accidentally stomped on him on the [[Rainbow Bridge|bridge]] and I've felt so guilty, I've been carrying him around all day.|[[Korg]] to [[Thor]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} The ''[[Statesman]]'' ultimately arrived near [[Asgard]]'s [[Rainbow Bridge]]. Miek got off the spaceship with her fellow rebels and began attacking [[Hela]]'s [[Berserkers]] so that the [[Asgardians]] could escape the Goddess of Death's tyrannical rule. Miek successfully defeated several Berserkers, but was accidentally stomped by [[Korg]], which knocked her unconscious. Believing her to be dead, Korg was not ready to accept the loss of his friend and took her body on the ''Statesman'' while the ship escaped the planet.{{Ref|TR}} ====Joining the Asgardians==== [[File:Miek Revived.png|{{AltFloat}}|Miek eventually regains consciousness]] {{Quote|Oh, Miek, you're alive! He's alive, guys.|[[Korg]]|Thor: Ragnarok}} Following the battle, [[Korg]] kept carrying Miek's body with him as they had made their escape. When [[Thor]] decided to lead [[Asgardians]] to a new home, he asked Miek where she was from. Although Korg told Thor that Miek was dead, the Sakaaran regained consciousness, much to Korg's delight.{{Ref|TR}} ===[[Infinity War]]=== ====[[Attack on the Statesman|Attack on the ''Statesman'']]==== In [[2018]], the ''[[Statesman]]'' was ambushed by [[Thanos]] and the [[Black Order]]. Miek was one of the many survivors, helping lead the spared Asgardians to safety on escape pods alongside [[Korg]] and [[Valkyrie]].{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Snap]]==== Miek was among those who survived the [[Snap]], along with [[Korg]] and [[Valkyrie]].{{Ref|AE}} ===Life on Earth=== ====Living with Thor==== [[File:Korg-Meik-PlayingFortnite.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|left|Miek and [[Korg]] living on [[Earth]]]] {{Quote|Hulk, you know my friends, Miek, Korg, right?"
"Hey, boys!"
"Hey, guys, long time no see.|[[Thor]], [[Korg]] and [[Hulk]]|Avengers: Endgame}} Miek, alongside [[Korg]], [[Valkyrie]], and the other [[Asgardian]] survivors arrived on [[Earth]] and reunited with [[Thor]] in [[Tønsberg]], [[Norway]], which was renamed [[New Asgard]]. For the next five years, Miek developed a sloth-like existence, devouring pizza, watching Korg play video games and [[Thor]] drink himself to insensibility. In [[2023]], Miek was present when [[Rocket]] and [[Bruce Banner]] arrived to persuade Thor to come with them.{{Ref|AE}} ====[[Battle of Earth]]==== [[File:JyvtUEg.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Miek joining the [[Battle of Earth|battle]] against an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]]]] Later, following the [[Blip]], Miek, along with [[Korg]], [[Valkyrie]], and the [[Einherjar]] were transported by the [[Masters of the Mystic Arts]] via a [[Inter-Dimensional Portal|portal]] to the ruins of the [[Avengers Compound]] to join the [[Battle of Earth|battle]] against an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]] and his army. Miek engaged in the battle with a new combat exoskeleton, complete with blades, and fought alongside Korg.{{Ref|AE}} ====Valkyrie's Secretary==== [[File:Infinity conez opening.png|{{AltFloat}}|Miek working with [[Valkyrie]]]] Sometime later, Miek was taken in by [[Valkyrie]], who let her become her personal secretary to assist her in her duties as King. She oversaw various new establishments to New Asgard, such as the grand opening of [[Infinity Conez]], a new ice-cream shop that displayed a life size model of the [[Infinity Gauntlet]]. [[File:Miek on Earth.png|{{AltFloat}}|Miek is interrupted by [[Thor]]]] In the fall of [[2025]], following the [[Attack on New Asgard|attack]] on New Asgard by [[Gorr the God Butcher]], Miek was ordered to speak to each parent of the missing children. Inside the [[New Asgard Town Hall]], Miek was reunited with [[Thor]] and wrote every word of his speech on the whiteboard about the rescue plan, before being interrupted by Thor, who asked her to stop making the noise because it interrupted his motivational speech. However, Thor then asked Miek to write down the last point of his speech. Later, Miek went to the [[New Asgard Docks]] to see Thor, Valkyrie, [[Korg]], and [[Mighty Thor]] off on the [[Aegir]] led by [[Toothgrinder]] and [[Toothgnasher]].{{Ref|TLaT}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== *'''Exoskeleton Capabilities''': Miek was provided with an artificial exoskeleton to use in the [[Contest of Champions]]. Among many abilities, the exoskeletons arms were fitted with blades that were able to slice an opponent. **'''Enhanced Strength''': Miek has enhanced strength, which allowed her to defeat multiple [[Berserkers]], [[Outriders]] and [[Chitauri]] in battle. **'''Enhanced Durability''': Miek, even without her exoskeleton, is incredibly resilient to physical injury, as she was able to withstand unintentionally being stomped on by the very heavy [[Korg]]. **'''Enhanced Agility''': With the aid of her exoskeleton, she was able to quickly overcome the agile Berserkers, as well as several Outriders and Chitauri. ===Abilities=== *'''Expert Combatant''': Miek is a proficient combatant, for she survived many gladiatorial matches in the [[Grandmaster]]'s [[Contest of Champions]] and was able to defeat many [[Berserkers]] thanks to her blades. During the [[Battle of Earth]], Miek once again demonstrated her combat abilities by defeating many [[Sakaarans]], [[Outriders]] and [[Chitauri]]. *'''Sword Mastery''': Miek is incredibly skilled in wielding her blades in hand-to-hand combat. ==Equipment== ===Other Equipment=== *'''Exoskeleton''': Miek's body consists of a head and several stubby legs, fitted with an artificial exoskeleton and armed with blades which enables him to move and attack very quickly. ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Statesman]]''''': Miek and the other members of the [[Sakaaran Rebellion]] used this ship to escape from [[Sakaar]]. They used the ''Statesman'' to head to [[Asgard]] and to [[Destruction of Asgard|save]] the [[Asgardians]] from [[Ragnarök]]. After Asgard was successfully evacuated, the ship was used to head to Earth. However, it was [[Attack on the Statesman|attacked]] on the way there by [[Thanos]] and the [[Black Order]] and destroyed. Miek was one of the few survivors who escaped in an escape pod. ==Facilities== *'''[[Grand Arena]]''': Miek was forced to fight in the Grand Arena on [[Sakaar]] by the [[Grandmaster]]. She watched as [[Thor]] fought [[Hulk]] before being defeated by him. *'''[[New Asgard]]''': Miek lived with her friends and fellow [[Snap]] survivors, [[Thor]] and [[Korg]] in a house in New Asgard. Sometime after Thor helped the remaining [[Avengers]] [[blip|bring the snap victims back]], Miek was hired as King [[Valkyrie]]'s secretary. She assisted Valkyrie in tasks that required her to interact with places and people all over the village.{{Ref|TLaT}} ==Relationships== {{col-begin}}{{col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Sakaaran Rebellion]] Obsidian]] † **[[Proxima Midnight/Cosmic Time Heist|Proxima Midnight]] † **[[Corvus Glaive/Cosmic Time Heist|Corvus Glaive]] † *[[Chitauri]] **[[Leviathans]] **[[Chitauri Gorillas]] *[[Outriders]] *[[Sakaarans]] *[[Gorr the God Butcher]] † *[[Shadow Monsters]] {{col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, Miek is an ally of [[Hulk]] in the [[Sakaar]] arena, who later tries to manipulate him into destroying [[Earth]]. **This is in stark contrast to the comics, in which the death of the last female of Miek's species was a major plot point in his storyline. ==Behind the Scenes== *At one point, [[Kevin Feige]] and Taika Waititi talked about potentially doing a [[Marvel One-Shots|One-Shot]] short film featuring [[Korg]] and Miek.[https://www.fandango.com/movie-news/marvel-has-big-plans-for-korg-and-miek-from-thor-ragnarok-752739 MARVEL HAS BIG PLANS FOR KORG AND MIEK FROM ‘THOR: RAGNAROK’] *Miek was referred to as a male in ''[[Thor: Ragnarok]]''. However, prior to the production of ''[[Thor: Love and Thunder]]'', Taika Waititi revealed concept art of Miek with a feminine looking exoskeleton and wearing a skirt.[https://thedirect.com/article/breaking-miek-will-be-female-in-thor-love-and-thunder First Thor: Love And Thunder Concept Art Reveals "New" Asgard, Female Miek] Miek was confirmed to be female in ''[[Thor: Love and Thunder]]'' by Valkyrie, who refers to her as female. ==References== {{Gallery|Miek/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP}} [[es:Miek]] [[ru:Миек]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Thor: Ragnarok Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Endgame Characters]] [[Category:Thor: Love and Thunder Characters]] [[Category:Sakaarans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:No Hair]] [[Category:Black Eyes]] [[Category:Contest of Champions Challengers]] [[Category:Sakaaran Rebellion Members]] [[Category:Genderbent for the Marvel Cinematic Universe]]
